name: an-dr-ui-control
description: Configure Activity Bar layout — visibility and order — stored in settings.json so it syncs across machines.

commands.title: UI Control: Scan for New Extensions

uiControl.activityBar.description: Ordered list of Activity Bar view containers with visibility settings. New items are appended as visible. Stored in settings.json so Settings Sync carries it across machines.

visible.description: Whether to show this item in the Activity Bar

uiControl.applyOnStartup.description: On startup, write the layout to VS Code's internal state and prompt to reload if anything changed.

uiControl.statusBarIconOnly.description: Show only the icon in the status bar (no text label).

uiControl.pythonPath.description: Path to Python 3 executable (e.g. /usr/bin/python3). Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH.
